creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
I updated the spim version from 5.9 to 6.2.
	Setting ALL_TARGET is no longer necessary and unsetting
XMKMF did not seem to do any harm.
	Besides, I am letting the port install spim and xspim by
itself. Therefore, I did post-install the other way around and
simplified patch-01

	+ 0 files added/removed
	+ 0 directories added/removed

How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
